name: Spam Imperial Tortilla Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Cucumber, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the SPAM and cream cheese.
2. Stir in the chopped green onion and dill.
3. Spread one-third of the SPAM mixture evenly over each tortilla.
4. Top with one-third of the cucumber, sunflower seeds, and alfalfa sprouts.
5. Roll up each tortilla into a jelly roll formation and wrap tightly in plastic wrap.
6. Repeat with the remaining tortillas.
7. Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
8. Cut each roll in half before serving.
